comment: Clean Code was a solid read. Robert C. Martin kept the ideas clear, and it actually held my attention the whole time.
I liked how Clean Code stayed practical instead of trying too hard to sound clever. It was useful, straight up.
Clean Code had a few slow parts, but the strong sections really delivered. I'd still recommend it.
This one was easy to follow. Robert C. Martin explained the main points well without dragging everything out.
Clean Code felt worth the time. The examples and pacing made it easier to stick with than I expected.
